economic_notes: Organization economically dependent on government funding. KRW Limited Partnership established to develop real property on Brandon Lands with Keeseekoowenin and Waywayseecappo First Nations - no development activity in current year. COVID-19 pandemic declared in March 2020 with uncertain financial impact. Southquill Gaming Centre, Southquill Gas Bar, and Southquill Restaurant are band-owned enterprises.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020 not 2024. Consolidated entities include Band Operations, Housing, Post-Secondary, Social Assistance, Southquill Health Services, Southquill Gaming Centre, and Southquill Gas Bar. KRW Limited Partnership is accounted for on a modified equity basis (GBE). No schedule of remuneration included in financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($5,509,874) + FNIHB ($2,567,151) + First Peoples Development Inc ($239,753) + CMHC ($9,188) + Province of Manitoba ($172,945) = $8,498,911. Annual debt service includes long-term debt repayments ($166,163) and capital lease repayments ($23,367) = $189,530. Segment disclosure total expenses ($16,808,672) differs from Statement of Operations expenses ($15,761,589 operating + $1,047,083 amortization = $16,808,672) as segment includes amortization. Obligations under capital lease of $205,086 excluded from long_term_debt field. COVID-19 subsequent event noted. Honoraria of $55,635 paid suggesting chief and council remuneration exists but no formal schedule provided.
